meta.note: All commands use the prefix '-'. Flags use '--key=value' or '--flag' format. DM = direct message, Group = group chat only.

cards.description: Card collecting, trading, auctioning, and management system.
cards.where: Most require group chat. Some work in DM.

commands.name: auction
commands.description: Start, end, or view a card auction from your deck. Local auctions stay in your group. Global auctions broadcast to all card-spawn-enabled groups.

index.description: Position of the card in your deck to auction

--type.description: Scope of the auction. Global = all card groups, Local = this group only

--bit.description: Starting bid price. If omitted, a random price (₹1000–5000) is used

--end.description: Manually end your running auction early. Only seller or dev can use this

--info.description: View full details of the active auction including bid history

examples.description: Start a global auction for deck card #1 lasting 10 minutes with ₹50,000 starting bid
Start a local 5-minute auction for deck card #3 with random starting price
End your running global auction immediately
Check the current auction status, bids, and time remaining

commands.name: bid
commands.description: Place a bid on the active auction. Must be at least ₹100 higher than the current bid. Previous highest bidder is automatically refunded. 5-second cooldown between bids per user.

amount.description: Bid amount. Must exceed current highest bid by at least ₹100

--list.description: Show all unique bidders ranked by their highest bid with timestamps

examples.description: Place a bid of ₹15,000 on the active auction
High bid to try to win the auction outright
View all bidders, their amounts, and bid times

commands.name: cards
commands.description: View your full card inventory across both deck and collection. Use --org to group cards by tier.

--org.description: Organize cards by tier (UR → C) instead of index order

examples.description: View all cards in index order
View all cards grouped by tier

commands.name: deck
commands.description: View your active deck as a collage image (up to 12 cards). Provide an index to view a single card with full stats and media.

index.description: View detailed stats and media for that specific deck card

examples.description: View card #3's image, tier, price and source

commands.name: collection
commands.description: View all cards stored in your collection (overflow from deck). Provide an index for detailed stats.

index.description: View that collection card's stats and image

commands.name: col2deck
commands.description: Move a card from your collection into your active deck. Deck limit is 12.

collection_index.description: Index of the card in your collection to move

examples.description: Move collection card #2 to your deck

commands.name: deck2col
commands.description: Move a card from your deck to your collection to free up deck space.

deck_index.description: Index of the deck card to move to collection

commands.name: claim
commands.description: Purchase the currently spawned card in the group. Supports discount codes, group tax, and Lucky Potion cashback. Race-safe — only one user can claim at a time.

--discount.description: Apply a discount code you own. Must meet the code's minimum purchase amount

examples.description: Claim the current spawned card at full price
Claim with a discount code applied

commands.name: claimchallenge
commands.description: Claim your card reward after completing a challenge. The reward is a card from your wishlist. Must claim within 48 hours of completion.

commands.name: mychallenge
commands.description: View your active challenge progress. Use --new to request a new challenge (only if you have no current active one and have cards in your wishlist).

--new.description: Request a new challenge assignment. Requires at least 1 wishlist card.

commands.name: mywishlist
commands.description: View your wishlist of desired cards. Cards on the wishlist are used as challenge rewards. Max 20 cards.

--local.description: Filter to show only cards owned by members of this group

--global.description: Show global ownership stats for your wishlist cards

--remove.description: Remove the wishlist card at the given index

commands.name: wishlistadd
commands.description: Add a card to your wishlist using its Mazoku or Shoob URL. Max 20 cards on wishlist.

url.description: Direct URL to a Mazoku or Shoob card page

examples.description: Add a Mazoku card to wishlist
Add a Shoob card to wishlist

commands.name: delcard
commands.description: Delete cards from your collection or deck by index. Use --d to delete all duplicates automatically.

indexes.description: One or more card indexes to delete, space-separated

--d.description: Delete all duplicate cards (keeps one copy of each)

commands.name: exchange
commands.description: Propose a deck card swap with another user. Both cards must be in deck. The other user must accept with -eaccept.

user.description: The user you want to trade with

your_index.description: Your deck card index to offer

their_index.description: Their deck card index you want

examples.description: Offer your deck card #1 for their deck card #3

commands.name: eaccept
commands.description: Accept a pending card exchange request using the trade ID.

exchangeID.description: The trade ID from the exchange request message

examples.description: Accept exchange request with ID ABC123

commands.name: edecline
commands.description: Decline or cancel a pending card exchange. Unlocks both parties' inventories.

commands.name: giftcard
commands.description: Gift a card from your deck to another user for a ₹1,000 fee.

card_index.description: Your deck card index to gift

examples.description: Gift deck card #1 to a user

commands.name: acceptgift
commands.description: Accept a gifted card using the gift ID from the gift notification.

gift_id.description: Gift ID from the gift message

commands.name: givecard
commands.description: Give a card from your deck to another user. Free, no fee.

examples.description: Give deck card #1 to that user

commands.name: givecol
commands.description: Give a card from your collection to another user. Fee charged goes to group funds.

examples.description: Give collection card #5 to that user

commands.name: swapdeck
commands.description: Swap the positions of two cards in your active deck.

commands.name: swapcollection
commands.description: Swap the positions of two cards in your collection.

commands.name: revalue
commands.description: Revalue one or all cards to update their market price based on current economy.

index_or_all.description: Card index to revalue, or 'all' to revalue every card you own

commands.name: mazsearch
commands.description: Search for a Mazoku card by name with optional rarity filter.

query.description: Card name or partial name to search

--rarity.description: Filter results to a specific rarity

examples.description: Search Mazoku cards with 'rem' in name

commands.name: shoobsearch
commands.description: Search for a Shoob card by name with optional tier filter.

examples.description: Search for Tier S 'rem' shoob cards

commands.name: searchcard
commands.description: Search your own card inventory (deck + collection) by name.

query.description: Search term to match against card titles

examples.description: Find all your cards with 'rem' in the title

commands.name: cardowners
commands.description: See how many users own a specific card from your deck or collection.

commands.name: topcardvalue
commands.description: Show the most expensive cards globally or filter by deck/collection.

commands.name: topcardwealth
commands.description: Top 10 users by total card wealth (deck + collection combined value).

commands.name: totalwealth
commands.description: Calculate your total card net worth across all cards using the highest available price per card.

examples.description: See your total card wealth breakdown

commands.name: topcards
commands.description: View your personal top 10 most valuable cards.

commands.name: topcollector
commands.description: Find who owns the most copies of a specific card name or series.

--type.description: Match by exact card name or by series/source

examples.description: Find top collectors of all Naruto series cards
Find top collectors of cards named 'rem'

economy.description: Currency, gambling, banking, and trading system.
economy.where: Most require group chat with eco_game feature active.

commands.name: wallet
commands.description: Check your current wallet balance.

commands.name: bank
commands.description: Check your bank balance and current capacity.

commands.name: deposit
commands.description: Deposit money from wallet to bank.

amount.description: Amount to deposit or 'all' to deposit everything

commands.name: withdraw
commands.description: Withdraw money from bank to wallet.

commands.name: upgradebank
commands.description: Increase your bank capacity. Every 100,000 capacity costs ₹10,000.

capacity.description: Target capacity to upgrade to (must be multiple of 100,000)

commands.name: transfer
commands.description: Send money to another registered user. Arg order doesn't matter.

examples.description: Same — amount and mention can be in any order

commands.name: daily
commands.description: Claim your daily reward. Resets every 24 hours. Streak system gives bonus rewards.

commands.name: gamble
commands.description: Bet on up or down. Win chance starts at 20–55% and decreases after 30 daily bets. Normal groups lose 7% per extra bet. Support groups lose 1.5% per extra bet. Win chance never goes below 10%. Jackpot possible at 100x. Max 30 bets/day (tilt kicks in after).

commands.name: slot
commands.description: Spin the slot machine. Win chance starts at 30%. After 30 spins: normal groups lose 7%/extra spin, support groups lose 1.5%/extra spin. Floor is 10%. Lucky Potion raises base to 40%. Max 90% with all bonuses.

commands.name: rob
commands.description: Attempt to rob another user's wallet. 2-hour cooldown between attempts. Need ₹500 in bank. 4 possible outcomes: success (steal 3–100% of wallet), caught (-₹500), fail, or escape. Rob protection potion can block attempts.

examples.description: Same using alias and phone number

commands.name: buy
commands.description: Buy items or potions from the store. For potions, specify days. For lootboxes, specify quantity (max 6).

quantity_or_days.description: Days for potions, quantity for other items

--discount.description: Apply a discount code to reduce price

examples.description: Buy item #1 for 30 days with discount code

commands.name: store
commands.description: View the store with all available items and their prices. Prices may vary by group economy.

examples.description: View all items available to purchase

commands.name: redeem
commands.description: Redeem a valid code to receive rewards (money, potions, or discount codes).

commands.name: discounts
commands.description: View all your active discount codes with details.

commands.name: inventory
commands.description: View your current inventory of potions, items, and loot boxes.

commands.name: topwealth
commands.description: Top 10 richest users by wallet + bank balance.

commands.name: sethome
commands.description: Set the current group as your home group. Home group affects tax rates and group wealth.

examples.description: Set this group as your home

commands.name: unsethome
commands.description: Remove your home group assignment.

commands.name: addgroupfund
commands.description: Contribute money from your wallet to the group fund.

commands.name: takegroupfund
commands.description: Withdraw money from the group fund to your wallet (admin only).

commands.name: claimgroupfund
commands.description: Claim your share of the group fund. Once per 24 hours.

commands.name: productcr
commands.description: Give an item from your inventory to another user.

examples.description: Give inventory item #1 to that user

commands.name: buystock
commands.description: Buy shares from the global stock market.

commands.name: sellstock
commands.description: Sell shares from your portfolio. Group tax applies.

commands.name: market
commands.description: View live global stock prices.

commands.name: portfolio
commands.description: View your current stock holdings and total value.

group.description: Group management, moderation, and MMO features.
group.where: Group only. Most require admin privileges.

commands.name: warn
commands.description: Issue a warning to a member. 6 warning types: 1=Message Penalty, 2=Economy Block, 3=Unstable(30% skip), 4=Throttle(5s delay), 5=Economy Tax(50-90% cut), 6=Claim Block(card redirected).

commands.name: unwarn
commands.description: Remove a warning from a user by type number.

commands.name: timeout
commands.description: Prevent a user from using commands for a set duration.

commands.name: cleartimeout
commands.description: Immediately lift a user's active timeout.

commands.name: mute
commands.description: Mute one or more users — their messages will be deleted by the bot.

users.description: One or more users to mute

commands.name: unmute
commands.description: Unmute a muted user.

commands.name: cmdban
commands.description: Ban a user from using specific commands or command categories in this group.

examples.description: Ban user from using gamble in this group

commands.name: cmdunban
commands.description: Lift a command ban from a user in this group.

commands.name: setcooldown
commands.description: Set a custom cooldown for any command in this group.

command.description: Command name to apply cooldown to

commands.name: resetcooldown
commands.description: Reset a command's cooldown to the global default.

commands.name: promote
commands.description: Promote a user to group admin.

commands.name: demote
commands.description: Remove admin role from a user.

commands.name: remove
commands.description: Kick a user from the group.

commands.name: tagall
commands.description: Mention all group members with an optional message.

commands.name: announce
commands.description: Lock or unlock group messaging.

commands.name: activatefeature
commands.description: Activate an unlocked group feature.

index_or_key.description: Feature index from -unlockables or feature key

commands.name: deactivatefeature
commands.description: Pause an active group feature (time will not burn while paused).

commands.name: unlockfeature
commands.description: Purchase and unlock a group feature using group funds.

times.description: How many months to unlock for

commands.name: unlockables
commands.description: View all purchasable group features and their requirements.

examples.description: See all features available to buy

commands.name: groupfeatures
commands.description: View all active/inactive group features and how much time remains on each.

commands.name: settax
commands.description: Configure the tax rate for economy commands in this group.

commands.name: setcooldown
commands.description: Set custom command cooldown for the group.

commands.name: mmo
commands.description: Enable or disable the MMO (group XP & leveling) system for this group.

commands.name: activity
commands.description: Shows most active and inactive members over recent days.

--days.description: How many days to look back

examples.description: Top 20 active users from last 7 days

commands.name: appeal
commands.description: Pay ₹50,000 to clear one of your temporary warning types.

commands.name: groupinfo
commands.description: View detailed stats about the group including level, XP, features, and wealth.

commands.name: topgroups
commands.description: Top 10 wealthiest groups by group fund + member home bank values.

misc.description: Profile, registration, and general utility commands.

commands.name: register
commands.description: Create your bot account. Requires a registration code from -getreg.

commands.name: getreg
commands.description: Get a registration code to create your bot account.

commands.name: profile
commands.description: View your full profile including rank, XP, bio, relationship status, and stats.

commands.name: rank
commands.description: Check your current XP rank, progress to next rank, and leaderboard position.

commands.name: topxp
commands.description: Top 10 users by XP. Use --global for global rankings.

commands.name: help
commands.description: View the help menu or get details on a specific command.

examples.description: Get details on the wallet command

commands.name: setbio
commands.description: Set a custom bio on your profile. Charged per month. Bio expires automatically.

months.description: How many months to keep the bio

commands.name: setpfp
commands.description: Set a custom profile picture by replying to an image or GIF. Charged per month.

commands.name: afk
commands.description: Set yourself as AFK with a reason. Bot will notify others who mention you.

commands.name: rf
commands.description: Enable or disable relationship flag (makes you visible in -rflist).

commands.name: alive
commands.description: Set which bot responds in this group. All other bots go silent.

commands.name: stop
commands.description: Silence all bots in this group until -alive is used again.

examples.description: Silence all bots in this group

commands.name: support
commands.description: Get support group invite links sent to your DM.

examples.description: Get support group links in DM

commands.name: info
commands.description: View bot statistics, uptime, and system information.

commands.name: tictactoe
commands.description: Play Tic-Tac-Toe with betting. 5 rounds. Winner takes both bets.

challenge.description: Start a match with a bet

mark.description: Place your mark. Cells: a1–c3 (row/col grid)

examples.description: Challenge user to TTT with ₹1,000 bet each

commands.name: guesspokemon
commands.description: Guess the silhouetted Pokémon before time runs out.

pet.description: Virtual pet system. Pets have hunger, happiness, and energy stats that decay over time.

commands.name: petshop
commands.description: View available pets, their variants, and costs.

commands.name: adopt
commands.description: Adopt a pet from the shop. Choose type, variant, and give it a nickname.

examples.description: Adopt a black dog named Sparky

commands.name: petstatus
commands.description: View your pet's current stats: hunger, happiness, energy, and mood.

commands.name: feed
commands.description: Feed your pet to restore hunger (30%) and a bit of happiness. Costs ₹50. 30-minute cooldown.

commands.name: playpet
commands.description: Play with your pet to boost happiness and gain XP. Costs ₹75. 15-minute cooldown.

commands.name: sleeppet
commands.description: Put your pet to sleep to restore energy. Free — 20 min sleep, 2-hour cooldown between naps.

commands.name: setpetbg
commands.description: Set a custom background for your pet status card.

commands.name: release
commands.description: Release your pet (or clear a dead pet from your profile).

weeb.description: Waifu/Husbando marriage and interaction system. Bond grows with interactions.

commands.name: random
commands.description: Roll a random waifu or husbando. The result stays in the group for 10 minutes for others to marry.

commands.name: marry
commands.description: Marry the currently rolled waifu or husbando in this group.

commands.name: partner
commands.description: View your current married waifu or husbando with their stats.

commands.name: divorce
commands.description: Divorce your current waifu or husbando.

commands.name: sluglove
commands.description: View your Love XP, bond level, and cooldowns for all partner interactions.

commands.name: sluglevelup
commands.description: Level up your bond with your partner using accumulated Love XP.

examples.description: Level up bond if enough Love XP

commands.name: slugkiss
commands.description: Kiss your waifu/husbando. Grants Love XP.

commands.name: slugcuddle
commands.description: Cuddle your partner. Requires Bond Level 1 (Acquaintances).

commands.name: slugrival
commands.description: Fight a rival challenging your partner. Requires Bond Level 2 (Friends).

commands.name: slugdate
commands.description: Take your partner on a date. Requires Bond Level 3 (Close Friends).

commands.name: mating
commands.description: A powerful mating moment. Requires Bond Level 5 (Dating).

commands.name: intercourse
commands.description: Intimate moment. Requires Bond Level 7 (Devoted).

commands.name: search
commands.description: Search DuckDuckGo and return top results.

commands.name: weather
commands.description: Get weather and 5-day forecast for any location.

commands.name: anime
commands.description: Get anime info from AniList.

commands.name: pokedex
commands.description: Get Pokédex entry for a Pokémon.

commands.name: lyrics
commands.description: Fetch song lyrics.

examples.description: Get Perfect by Ed Sheeran lyrics

commands.name: image
commands.description: Search and send images (max 7 at once).

commands.name: wikipedia
commands.description: Get a Wikipedia summary.

commands.name: translate
commands.description: Translate text or a replied message to another language.

input.description: '<text> | <lang>' or just '<lang>' when replying to a message

commands.name: sticker
commands.description: Convert an image, GIF, or video to a sticker. Reply to media or send directly.

pack_author.description: Pack name and author separated by | (e.g. MyPack|ByMe)

examples.description: Make circular sticker with pack name
Make cropped sticker from quoted image

commands.name: unsticker
commands.description: Convert a sticker back to image or video.

commands.name: steal
commands.description: Change the pack name and author of a sticker.

dev.description: Developer/moderator only commands. Restricted to users in the mods list.

commands.name: ban
commands.description: Globally ban a user from using the bot across all groups.

commands.name: unban
commands.description: Lift a global ban from a user.

commands.name: chatbot
commands.description: Toggle the character.ai chatbot on or off globally. Default is ON. When OFF, the bot silently ignores all @mentions and DMs.

commands.name: disable
commands.description: Globally disable a command so no user can use it.

commands.name: enable
commands.description: Re-enable a globally disabled command.

commands.name: broadcast
commands.description: Send a message to every group the bot is in.

commands.name: addmoney
commands.description: Add money to a user's wallet.

commands.name: addexp
commands.description: Add XP to a user.

commands.name: addmazcard
commands.description: Add a Mazoku card to a user's deck by UUID.

commands.name: addshoobcard
commands.description: Add a Shoob card to a user's deck by card ID.

commands.name: addmod
commands.description: Add a new global bot moderator.

commands.name: removemod
commands.description: Remove a moderator's access.

commands.name: addsupportgroup
commands.description: Register the current group as a support group.

commands.name: listsupportgroups
commands.description: List all registered support groups with usage stats and lock status.

commands.name: globalrevalue
commands.description: Manually trigger a full revaluation of every card owned by every user.

commands.name: wishlistspawn
commands.description: Spawn a specific card from a user's wishlist and give it to them by index.

examples.description: Give user their first wishlist card

commands.name: eval
commands.description: Execute arbitrary JavaScript. Use with extreme caution.
